title: Choose How Styles Reach the Document
summary: Build and verify css application methods in multi-page survey stylesheet delivery review through prediction, inspection, explanation, cumulative code, and changed-case transfer.
objectives: Explain css application methods from purpose, behavior, and evidence.
Apply css application methods without discarding earlier valid work.
Diagnose the named misconception in changed content, input, and failure states.

steps.title: 05 · Read the multi-page survey stylesheet delivery review case · theory
steps.instruction: Checkpoint 5: Which claim preserves css application methods when data, input, and layout change? Scenario: multi-page survey stylesheet delivery review.
steps.why: Choose How Styles Reach the Document makes the decision observable and testable. This is checkpoint 5 in multi-page survey stylesheet delivery review.

content.text: External stylesheets provide reusable cacheable presentation across pages. Embedded style elements can support a narrowly scoped document or critical exception. Inline style attributes couple presentation to individual elements and create high-specificity maintenance costs. The choice depends on reuse, delivery, security policy, critical rendering, and ownership rather than convenience alone. Apply it to multi-page survey stylesheet delivery review.
